member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.Configuration.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates new instance of class and provide a way to retrieve properties.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for IConfigurationBuilder.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilderExtensions.AddDefaults(ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds default configuration sources to the configuration builder.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilderExtensions.AddDefaults(ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds default configuration sources to the configuration builder with a specified base directory.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilderExtensions.AddJsonFile(ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a JSON file as a configuration source to the configuration builder.
member.param: The path to the JSON file.
A flag indicating whether the file is optional.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilderExtensions.AddEnvironmentVariables(ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds environment variables as a configuration source to the configuration builder.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilderExtensions.AddEnvironmentVariables(ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds environment variables with a specified prefix and delimiter as a configuration source to the configuration builder.
member.param: The prefix for the environment variables.
The delimiter for the environment variables.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationBuilderExtensions.AddDirectoryProbing(ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a directory probing configuration provider to the configuration builder.
member.param: The prefix for the configuration keys.
The delimiter for the configuration keys.
A flag indicating whether the directory is optional.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath
member.summary: Stores well known configuration property names.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.KeyDelimeter
member.summary: The delimiter used to separate keys in the configuration path.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.AppenderPrefix
member.summary: The prefix used to identify appenders in the configuration path.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.ServerUrl
member.summary: The configuration path for the server URL.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.ServerProject
member.summary: The configuration path for the server project.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.ServerAuthenticationUuid
member.summary: The configuration path for the server authentication UUID.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.ServerAuthenticationKey
member.summary: The configuration path for the server authentication key.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.LogsBatchCapacity
member.summary: The configuration path for the logs batch capacity.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.AsyncReporting
member.summary: The configuration path for async reporting.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.LaunchName
member.summary: The configuration path for the launch name.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.LaunchDescription
member.summary: The configuration path for the launch description.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.LaunchDebugMode
member.summary: The configuration path for the launch debug mode.

member.name: F:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.ConfigurationPath.LaunchTags
member.summary: The configuration path for the launch tags.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration
member.summary: Stores configuration variables from different providers.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration.Properties
member.summary: Fetched configuration variables.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration.GetValue``1(System.String)
member.summary: Returns value of configuration property.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration.GetValue``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Returns value of configuration property.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration.GetValues``1(System.String)
member.summary: Returns values of configuration property.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration.GetValues``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Returns values of configuration property.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration.GetKeyValues``1(System.String)
member.summary: Returns pairs of key:value of configuration property.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfiguration.GetKeyValues``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,``0}})
member.summary: Returns pairs of key:value of configuration property.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder
member.summary: Builds instance to retrieve configuration variables from different providers.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder.Providers
member.summary: Gets registered providers.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder.Add(ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationProvider)
member.summary: Register provider to be considered as configuration source.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder.Build
member.summary: Asks all registered providers to fetch configuration variables from a source.
member.returns: Configuration instance with fethed configuration variables.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationProvider
member.summary: Provides a way to retrieve configuration variables.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.IConfigurationProvider.Load
member.summary: Fethes configuration variables as dictionary.
member.returns: Dictionary where key is property name and value is property value.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.Providers.DirectoryProbingConfigurationProvider
member.summary: Finds files in a directory and consider their content as a value for configuration properties.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.Providers.DirectoryProbingConfigurationProvider.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates new instance of class.
member.param: Path to a directory where to find files.
Consider this string as hierarchic property.
Returns empty list of properties if directory doesn't exist.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.Providers.EnvironmentVariablesConfigurationProvider
member.summary: Retrieves environment variables as configuration properties.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.Providers.EnvironmentVariablesConfigurationProvider.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.EnvironmentVariableTarget)
member.summary: Creates new instance of class.
member.param: Only use environment variables which starts from spicific prefix.
Property is considered as hierarchical if its name contains specific character.
Environment variables scope, like machine scoped or process scoped.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.Providers.JsonFileConfigurationProvider
member.summary: Parse json file with configuration properties as flatten dictionary.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Configuration.Providers.JsonFileConfigurationProvider.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates new instance of class.
member.param: Char which represents hierarchy of flatten properties.
If file doesn't exist then empty disctionary will be returns.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Context
member.summary: Provides an access to work with reporting context. Using it you are able to add log messages, amend curent test metainfo.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Context.Current
member.summary: Returns context to amend current test metadata or add log messages.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Context.Launch
member.summary: Returns context to amend current launch metadata or add log messages.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Converters.ItemAttributeConverter
member.summary: Converter of any string to instance.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Converters.ItemAttributeConverter.ConvertFrom(System.String,System.Action{ReportPortal.Shared.Converters.ItemAttributeConverter.ConvertOptions})
member.summary:
Translate string to ItemAttribute
component:search => key=component, value=search :search key=, value=search search: key=, value=search
Attribute value always should not be empty.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Converters.ItemAttributeConverter.ConvertOptions
member.summary: Defines options for .

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Converters.ItemAttributeConverter.ConvertOptions.UndefinedKey
member.summary: Key if it was not parsed.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Converters.ItemAttributeConverter.ConvertOptions.Default
member.summary: Returns default converter options.

member.summary: Time representation when log event occurs.

member.summary: Level of log event.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogMessage.Attachment
member.summary: Binary data attached to log event. Null if log event is without attachment.

member.summary: Represents binary attachment for log events.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogMessageAttachment.MimeType
member.summary: Type of attachment like image/png.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogMessageAttachment.Data
member.summary: Binary data of the attachment.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogScope
member.summary: Sends log messages to active logging scope.

member.summary: Unique ID of current logging scope.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogScope.Parent
member.summary: Parent logging scope.

member.summary: Root logging scope.

member.summary: Context which current logging scope belong to.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogScope.Name
member.summary: Logical login scope name.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogScope.BeginTime
member.summary: Time when loging scope began.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogScope.EndTime
member.summary: Time when logging scope ended.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogScope.Status
member.summary: Logging scope status.

member.summary: Starts new logging scope beginning from active scope.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogScope.Message(ReportPortal.Shared.Execution.Logging.ILogMessage)
member.summary: Sends log message to current test context.

member.summary: Sends log message with "Info" level to current test context.

member.summary: Sends binary content to current test context.

member.summary: Sends file to current test context.

member.summary: Sends log message with "Debug" level to current test context.

member.summary: Sends binary content to current test context.

member.summary: The logging scope has been skipped.

member.exception: Thrown when the value is null or empty.

member.summary: Determines whether the current object is equal to another object.
member.param: The object to compare with the current object.
member.returns: true if the objects are equal; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Determines whether the current object is equal to another object.

member.returns: true if the objects are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.AnalyticsReportEventsObserver
member.summary: Google Analytics launch events tracker.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.AnalyticsReportEventsObserver.#ctor
member.summary: Create an instance of AnalyticsReportEventsObserver object, construct own HttpClient if neccessary.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.AnalyticsReportEventsObserver.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpMessageHandler)
member.summary: Create an instance of AnalyticsReportEventsObserver object, use provided HttpMessageHandler to construct an HttpClient.
member.param: Http handler to construc a client

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.AnalyticsReportEventsObserver.DefineConsumer(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets custom information about agent name and version. It's expected this method is invoked on agent side.
member.param: Human readable name of the agent.
Automatically identified as calling assembly version if null.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.AnalyticsReportEventsObserver.AgentName
member.summary: Set the name of the Agent or use default name "Anonymous".

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.AnalyticsReportEventsObserver.AgentVersion
member.summary: Return the version of the Agent retrieved from Assembly.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.AnalyticsReportEventsObserver.Dispose
member.summary: Release HttpClient if needed.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Analytics.ClientIdProvider.GetClientIdAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously gets the client ID from the properties file. If the file does not exist or the client ID is not found, a new ID is generated and saved to the file.
member.returns: The client ID as a string.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.Embedded.Normalization.RequestNormalizer
member.summary: Report events observer which makes basic validation and normalization before sending http requests to server. Examples: - Care about self/parent start/finish time - Limit long strings (name, attributes)

member.summary: Occurs before the launch is starting.

member.summary: Occurs after the launch has started.

member.summary: Occurs before the launch is finishing.

member.summary: Occurs after the launch has finished.

member.summary: Occurs after a test has started.

member.summary: Base class to expose functionality to execute a function (request) with statistics measuring.

member.summary: Invokes given func with retry strategy and exponential delay between attempts.

member.summary: Initializes new instance of .

member.summary: Initializes new instance of .
member.param: Http status codes to be retried.

member.summary: Maximum number of attempts

member.summary: Exponential base index for delay

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Internal.Delegating.ExponentialRetryRequestExecuter.HttpStatusCodes
member.summary: Http status codes to be retried.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Internal.Delegating.IRequestExecuter
member.summary: Delegate to invoke any Func.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Internal.Delegating.IRequestExecuter.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Action{System.Exception},ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.IStatisticsCounter,System.String)
member.summary: Executes func.
member.param: Callback action to be invoked between attempts.
Statistics counter to capture requests duration.
Logical operation name which describes the function to be invoked.

member.summary: Waits until request can be executed.

member.summary: Release one busy executer.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.LaunchInfo.StartTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the start time of the launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.LaunchInfo.FinishTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the finish time of the launch.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.LaunchInfo.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL of the launch.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource
member.summary: Represents a source of report events.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnLaunchInitializing
member.summary: Event that is triggered when the launch is initializing.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnBeforeLaunchStarting
member.summary: Event that is triggered before the launch starts.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnAfterLaunchStarted
member.summary: Event that is triggered after the launch has started.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnBeforeLaunchFinishing
member.summary: Event that is triggered before the launch finishes.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnAfterLaunchFinished
member.summary: Event that is triggered after the launch has finished.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnBeforeTestStarting
member.summary: Event that is triggered before a test starts.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnAfterTestStarted
member.summary: Event that is triggered after a test has started.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnBeforeTestFinishing
member.summary: Event that is triggered before a test finishes.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnAfterTestFinished
member.summary: Event that is triggered after a test has finished.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnBeforeLogsSending
member.summary: Event that is triggered before logs are sent.

member.name: E:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.OnAfterLogsSent
member.summary: Event that is triggered after logs have been sent.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.RaiseLaunchInitializing(ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource,ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ILaunchReporter,ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.ReportEvents.EventArgs.LaunchInitializingEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the OnLaunchInitializing event.

member.summary: Raises the OnBeforeLaunchStarting event.

member.summary: Raises the OnAfterLaunchStarted event.

member.summary: Raises the OnBeforeLaunchFinishing event.

member.summary: Raises the OnAfterLaunchFinished event.

member.summary: Raises the OnBeforeTestStarting event.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.RaiseAfterTestStarted(ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource,ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ITestReporter,ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.ReportEvents.EventArgs.AfterTestStartedEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the OnAfterTestStarted event.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.RaiseBeforeTestFinishing(ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource,ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ITestReporter,ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.ReportEvents.EventArgs.BeforeTestFinishingEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the OnBeforeTestFinishing event.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.RaiseAfterTestFinished(ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource,ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ITestReporter,ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.ReportEvents.EventArgs.AfterTestFinishedEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the OnAfterTestFinished event.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.RaiseBeforeLogsSending(ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource,ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ILogsReporter,ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.ReportEvents.EventArgs.BeforeLogsSendingEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the OnBeforeLogsSending event.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource.RaiseAfterLogsSent(ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ReportEventsSource,ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.ILogsReporter,ReportPortal.Shared.Extensibility.ReportEvents.EventArgs.AfterLogsSentEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the OnAfterLogsSent event.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.ILaunchStatisticsCounter
member.summary: Meta-interface to capture statistics about requests execution durations.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.ILaunchStatisticsCounter.StartTestItemStatisticsCounter
member.summary: Returns statistics about StartTestItem requests.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.ILaunchStatisticsCounter.FinishTestItemStatisticsCounter
member.summary: Returns statistics about FinishTestItem requests.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.ILaunchStatisticsCounter.LogItemStatisticsCounter
member.summary: Returns statistics about LogItem requests.

member.name: T:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.IStatisticsCounter
member.summary: Measuring of requests duration.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.IStatisticsCounter.Min
member.summary: Minimum duration of measured requests.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.IStatisticsCounter.Max
member.summary: Maximum duration of measured requests.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.IStatisticsCounter.Avg
member.summary: Average duration of measured requests.

member.name: P:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.IStatisticsCounter.Count
member.summary: Total count of measured requests.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.IStatisticsCounter.Measure(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Measure of request's duration in sequence.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.LaunchStatisticsCounter.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string that represents the statistics counter for launch.
member.returns: A string that represents the statistics counter.

member.name: M:ReportPortal.Shared.Reporter.Statistics.StatisticsCounter.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string that represents the statistics counter.
member.returns: A string that represents the statistics counter.
